tasks.title: Task 001: Audit Project Structure
goal: 理解当前 `px4_ros2_ws` 的目录结构。
找出已有 demo 脚本、可视化脚本、ROS2 包、日志目录。
生成项目结构摘要文档。

final_report.test result: - PASS。两个交付物存在且非空，文档覆盖 ROS2 包、demo 脚本、可视化输出和不可删除目录说明。
final_report.known risks: - 本任务只做结构审计和文档生成，未运行 PX4/Gazebo/ROS2 demo 或仿真实验。 - 工作区根目录不是 Git 仓库；`src/px4_msgs/` 自身含 `.git`。

Do not change `/uav/*` topic semantics.

tasks.title: Task 021: Add LeRobot Baseline Training and Policy Bridge
goal: Add the first LeRobot training and inference bridge around high-level actions.
tasks.implementation_summary: 增加 LeRobot baseline 训练脚本和 policy_bridge，策略只通过高层 UAV/arm 接口输出动作。
requirements_or_deliverables: Start with an imitation-learning baseline or documented wrapper around LeRobot's available ACT/SmolVLA tooling.
Inference must output high-level action chunks only; it must not write PX4 `/fmu/in/*`.
Include timeout/fallback behavior if inference stalls or disconnects.

tasks.title: Task 022: Add Air Reach Demo and Regression
goal: Combine the stage-2 pieces into a repeatable "air reach" demo and PASS/FAIL regression.
tasks.implementation_summary: 实现 Demo 10 air-reach 干运行/回归，包含合成机械臂控制器、指标检查和结果输出。
requirements_or_deliverables: Demo sequence: stable hover, tag detection, coordinated approach, near-target endpoint hold or light contact if contact sensing exists.
PASS/FAIL metrics must include flight error, joint limit violations, target visibility, task timeout, and final endpoint error.
Preserve existing Demo 01-04 scripts and outputs.
tasks.result: PASS. Latest checker output: `CHECK=PASS`, dry-run mode, `max_flight_error_m=0.067`, `final_endpoint_error_m=0.051`, `target_visible_ratio=0.775`.
